brief: Launch a test-ride campaign for the Vespa Elettrica in Italy, targeting young urban professionals in Milan and Rome. Goal: drive test-ride bookings via the Piaggio app. Tone: iconic, stylish, effortless, sustainable.

events.message: plan built: research, strategy, copy, creative, localize
grounded research done (3 brand + 2 web sources)

package.brief: Launch a test-ride campaign for the Vespa Elettrica in Italy, targeting young urban professionals in Milan and Rome. Goal: drive test-ride bookings via the Piaggio app. Tone: iconic, stylish, effortless, sustainable.

findings.claim: Vespa has been an icon of Italian design and urban freedom since 1946, giving the brand unmatched heritage equity.
The Vespa Elettrica extends that icon into zero-emission electric mobility without losing the classic silhouette.
The campaign should lead with style, heritage and effortless city freedom rather than technical specs or price.
Young urban professionals in Italian cities increasingly favour electric two-wheelers for congestion-free, sustainable commuting.
Design-led, aspirational creative plus an easy test-ride booking flow lifts conversion for premium mobility brands.

research.summary: Lead with Vespa's timeless Italian design and the effortless freedom of silent, electric city riding; make booking a test ride feel as stylish and simple as the ride itself.

segments: Young urban professionals (25-35) in Milan & Rome
Design-conscious commuters tired of traffic & parking
strategy.positioning: The timeless Italian icon, now electric. Effortless, silent, zero-emission freedom through the city, with a silhouette everyone recognises.

copy.headline: La dolce vita, now electric.
captions: Sixty years of style, zero emissions. The new Vespa Elettrica glides through the city in silence. Book your test ride. #Vespa #VespaElettrica #DolceVita
No traffic. No noise. No compromise on style. The icon goes electric, and the city has never looked better. 🛵⚡ #RideElectric #MadeInItaly
From Rome's cobblestones to Milan's boulevards, one silhouette turns every head, now with an electric heart. Reserve your ride today.
copy.email_subject: Your city, silent and electric — meet the new Vespa
copy.email_body:
Ciao,

Since 1946, the Vespa has meant freedom, style, and the pure joy of the ride. Now that icon goes electric.

The new Vespa Elettrica keeps the same unmistakable silhouette, with silent, zero-emission power made for the modern city. No traffic stress, no fuel stops, just effortless freedom through the streets you love.

Book your test ride in the Piaggio app and feel it for yourself.

A presto,
The Vespa Team

creative.concept: Cinematic Italian city at golden hour: cobblestone streets, espresso bars, a young professional gliding silently past on a pastel Vespa Elettrica, heads turning. Timeless style meets silent electric motion, la dolce vita reimagined.
image_prompts: Young Italian professional riding a pastel-mint Vespa Elettrica through a golden-hour Rome street, cobblestones, espresso bar in the background, cinematic, elegant, photorealistic
Vespa Elettrica parked on a Milan boulevard at dusk, soft neon reflections, minimalist premium advertising photography, stylish composition

captions_local: Sessant'anni di stile, zero emissioni. La nuova Vespa Elettrica scivola in silenzio tra le strade della città. Prenota il tuo test ride. #Vespa #VespaElettrica
Niente traffico. Niente rumore. Nessun compromesso sullo stile. L'icona diventa elettrica. 🛵⚡ #MadeInItaly
localization.note: Adapted to natural Italian; keeps the heritage plus effortless-freedom framing.
